strengths: 10+ years full-stack development in TypeScript, Node.js, and React—exceeds 6-year requirement with current Staff-level role

Proven architecture and scalability expertise: designed micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby; optimized pricing strategies at Optilyz; established CI/CD infrastructure at Altom
AI agent development actively underway: current role explicitly lists AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
concerns: No Nest.js framework mentioned despite it being primary stack—Node.js background is strong but framework-specific patterns differ
PostgreSQL experience not documented; MongoDB emphasized at Optilyz but relational database work remains implicit (SQL listed in skills without context)
Vitest and modern testing framework expertise unclear—TDD philosophy and testing projects shown, but specific Jest/Vitest/Playwright proficiency not evidenced
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 10+ years experience and strong fundamentals in TypeScript, Node.js, and React—the backbone of the primary stack. Current Staff role and architecture track record (micro-services, optimization, CI/CD) demonstrate capability for mid-senior IC responsibilities. AI agent development is actively underway, meeting that requirement. However, three specific stack components create friction: Nest.js is not mentioned (primary framework), PostgreSQL lacks explicit documentation (primary DB listed), and Vitest expertise is unclear. These are learnable for someone with this depth of backend/frontend fundamentals, but they represent framework and tool gaps rather than conceptual weakness. The candidate would require interview verification of Nest.js familiarity or acknowledgment that ramp-up is needed.
